/usr/bin/ar qc libkvdb.a CMakeFiles/kvdb.dir/src/kvdb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvdb.dir/src/db/shard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvdb.dir/src/db/hashtable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvdb.dir/src/db/storage_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvdb.dir/src/db/ttl_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvdb.dir/src/db/snapshot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvdb.dir/src/model/value.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvdb.dir/src/model/entry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvdb.dir/src/net/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvdb.dir/src/net/protocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvdb.dir/src/commands/command_registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvdb.dir/src/commands/set_command.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvdb.dir/src/commands/get_command.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvdb.dir/src/commands/del_command.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvdb.dir/src/commands/expire_command.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvdb.dir/src/utils/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvdb.dir/src/utils/hash.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libkvdb.a
